name: module_federation
description: PoC to demonstrate a MFE architecture for an energy management dashboard

scripts.dev: npm run dev --prefix=layout & npm run dev --prefix=widgets & npm run dev --prefix=regional-app-1 & npm run dev --prefix=regional-app-2 & npm run dev --prefix=eva
scripts.lint: npm run lint:eslint && npm run lint:lit-analyzer
scripts.build-and-run:layout: docker buildx build -f layout/Dockerfile --progress=plain -t layout:latest . && docker run -t -p 8080:80 layout:latest
scripts.build: LAYOUT_URL=$LAYOUT_URL npm run build --prefix=layout & WIDGETS_URL=$WIDGETS_URL npm run build --prefix=widgets & LAYOUT_URL=$LAYOUT_URL WIDGETS_URL=$WIDGETS_URL REGIONAL_APP_1_URL=$REGIONAL_APP_1_URL APP_PATH=$REGIONAL_APP_1_APP_PATH npm run build --prefix=regional-app-1 & LAYOUT_URL=$LAYOUT_URL WIDGETS_URL=$WIDGETS_URL REGIONAL_APP_2_URL=$REGIONAL_APP_2_URL REGIONAL_APP_2_URL=$REGIONAL_APP_2_URL APP_PATH=$REGIONAL_APP_2_APP_PATH npm run build --prefix=regional-app-2
scripts.deploy-github-pages:all: npm run deploy-github-pages:layout && npm run deploy-github-pages:widgets && npm run deploy-github-pages:regional-app-1 && npm run deploy-github-pages:regional-app-2
